nasb.text: But at these words he was saddened, and he went away grieving, for he was one who owned much property.

esv.text: Disheartened by the saying, he went away sorrowful, for he had great possessions.

cnv.text: 那人聽見這話，就變了臉色，憂憂愁愁地走了，因為他的財產很多。

ccb.text: 那人听了，脸色骤变，便沮丧地走了，因为他有许多产业。

csbs.text: 那个人因这话，脸色就变得阴沉，忧忧愁愁地走开了，因为他有很多财产。
